name: Antimagic Field

effects.description: An aura of antimagic surrounds you in 10-foot Emanation. No one can cast spells, take Magic actions, or create other magical effects inside the aura, and those things can't target or otherwise affect anything inside it. Magical properties of magic items don't work inside the aura or on anything inside it. Areas of effect created by spells or other magic can't extend into the aura, and no one can teleport into or out of it or use planar travel there. Portals close temporarily while in the aura. Ongoing spells, except those cast by an Artifact or a deity, are suppressed in the area. While an effect is suppressed, it doesn't function, but the time it spends suppressed counts against its duration. Dispel Magic has no effect on the aura, and the auras created by different Antimagic Field spells don't nullify each other.

controlOptions.name: Spellcasting suppression
controlOptions.effect: No one can cast spells, take Magic actions, or create other magical effects inside the aura.

controlOptions.name: Magic item suppression
controlOptions.effect: Magical properties of magic items do not work inside the aura or on anything inside it.

controlOptions.name: Area exclusion
controlOptions.effect: Areas of effect created by spells or other magic cannot extend into the aura.

controlOptions.name: Teleport and planar block
controlOptions.effect: No one can teleport into or out of the aura or use planar travel there.

controlOptions.name: Portal suppression
controlOptions.effect: Portals close temporarily while in the aura.

controlOptions.name: Ongoing spell suppression
controlOptions.effect: Ongoing spells are suppressed in the area except those cast by an Artifact or deity; suppressed time still counts against duration.
controlOptions.details: Dispel Magic has no effect on the aura, and different Antimagic Field auras do not nullify each other.
